summary: Educational mini-games project; update Match Word to Image game wrong-answer feedback to match Choose Correct Image design.

existing_features.title: Update the Match Word to Image gameplay wrong-answer feedback so that selecting an incorrect option shows the same large red X overlay style used in Choose Correct Image (semi-transparent red overlay with a large red X icon centered), covering only the specific selected option block (not the entire row), and then automatically clears after a short delay to allow unlimited tries on the same question.

new_feature_requests.summary: Match Word to Image: on wrong selection show same large red X overlay as Choose Correct Image, covering only the selected option, then fade to allow unlimited tries
